title: Introductory Algebra (2IA)
outline: Students study the fundamentals of abstract algebra and number theory, including: induction, strong induction and the Well-Ordering axiom; divisibility and prime factorisation; modular arithmetic; permutations; groups, subgroups, cyclic groups; isomorphisms; simple groups, factor groups and Lagrange's Theorem; the First Isomorphism Theorem.
lecture_times: Tuesdays, Fridays and some Wednesdays in 5th period. Note: Lectures alternate during the week so students can take MAM2012S, MAM2013S and MAM2014S concurrently.
